body_preview: Prevent `yyds state crashes` from showing harness preflight artifacts (empty_input, slash_command_in_piped_mode) as real crash sessions — label them distinctly or filter them by default with a `--all` flag to include them. expected_evidence: Assessment's future crash-log observation changes from "shows many empty_input crashes" to "shows only real crashes, preflight artifacts filtered." The `state crashes` output is cleaner and more actionable for debugging real harness failures. Implementation Notes: Modify `build_crashes_report` in `src/commands_state_crashes.rs` (line 36). title: Filter harness preflight crashes from state crashes output
